title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 22 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 22 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 22 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures market roseing sharply trends in the afternoon. the main contract I2401 closed 805.5, an increase of 4.47%throughout the day; some traders quotation is still stronger. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
